Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Damasca]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Nobles of Damasca supposedly keep slaves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Damasca is a place ruled by Overlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Alin wants someone to stand with him against Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Alin intended to fight Damasca.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Damasca is a kingdom with royal colors of red and gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — There is a war against Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Damasca is described as having an unnatural blight and practicing human sacrifice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Damasca practices human sacrifice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — There are plans to take action against Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Damasca is preparing for war following the death of Overlord Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Damasca is a target for destruction by Grandmaster teams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Damasca has kept Incarnations whipped, beaten, and chained underground for three centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Damasca has had a three-and-a-half century reign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Enosh would not work with Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah is second in line for the throne of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Indirial meets with the King to organize the Damascan war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmaster Endross and Avernus were ready to declare Simon an ally of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Damasca is a location that imprisons Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The rulers of Damasca use bloody Trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Damasca is a place that can commit to an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Damasca well-controls the Travel routes through Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Damasca is a place ruled by a tyrant king.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Damasca is a kingdom/entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Damasca has a throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Damasca has many Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Valin believes Damasca is evil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Alin does not want Simon to be kidnapped by Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Damasca is a nation with a map being used by Indirial and Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Naraka wants to avoid Alin being loyal to Damasca.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Damasca has a royal line that has reigned for three centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Grandmaster Helgard believes Damasca has no divine right to control the Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Leah sees no threat to Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Leah is the Queen of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Damasca is a location/entity Feiora's orders are not from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Damasca is a young nation that was attacked by the Elysian Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Damasca has prospered and flourished under Leah's family for three-and-a-half centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Zakareth claims to be the King of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Queen Cynara formed Damasca into a unified nation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
